paragraphs: I'm Swar — a 19-year-old developer from Navi Mumbai who builds things that work as good as they look. Currently deep in my engineering degree, shipping MERN stack projects, and occasionally winning hackathons.

My thing is bridging the gap between clean logic and sharp UI. I work primarily in the MERN stack, with modern tooling like Vite and GSAP — because if something's going on screen, it should feel like it belongs there.
Outside the editor: riding my bike, playing chess, cooking something questionable, and plotting the next hackathon.
